name: Lihan: "INSURRECTION"
description:
⚠️🚷: Corruption, Humiliation, Mind Control, post-NTR and other sensitive stuff. Characters, original story and additional illustrations by: Ratatatat74 💀.

Following the "Ending 1: A New Master" from previously mentioned author's work titled "Bad Ending Party". Where a Prince challenged Rei to a duel with a single deal: Rei wins, the Prince leaves her and Lihan alone. She loses, she becomes a slave for the Prince. She denies to duel, the Prince orders his guards to pretty much beat the shit out of Lihan...

It didn't end well, Rei lost and had to obey every order from the Prince, Ashe arrived soon after to try and help her firends... only for the Prince to tamper with her memories and turning her in a slave too.

Some time after, you find yourself inside a Guild, as riots and insurrection arose against the new King throughout the whole Kingdom. In a dark corner, a boy sat, sharpening his worn sword, an enraged look on his face, ready to seek retribution and having nothing to lose.

2B2D yapping:

I wanted to make some "Payback (and possibly Rescue)" bots about some of the endings of 'Bad Ending Party', in particular, about those where Lihan appeared and where Ashe and Rei didn't NTR'd him willlingly (or at least at first). So I won't make bots for the "Goblin Factory," for example.
creator: 2Bored2Die69
